channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DALBHARAT] Dalmia Bharat Ltd Subsidiary Faces Tax Demand Over ITC Disallowance for FY 2019-20
item.description:
Dalmia Bharat Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Dalmia Cement (Bharat) Limited (DCBL), has received two orders from tax authorities in Uttar Pradesh and Jharkhand. The orders, under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 and Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017, pertain to disallowance of Input Tax Credit (ITC) for FY 2019-20. The orders have imposed a demand of tax along with interest and penalty. DCBL has good grounds to contest and will file an appeal before the Appellate Authorities within prescribed timelines.

  • Dalmia Bharat Ltd's subsidiary, Dalmia Cement (Bharat) Limited, received orders from tax authorities in Uttar Pradesh and Jharkhand.
  • The orders are regarding disallowance of Input Tax Credit (ITC) for FY 2019-20 under Section 74 of the Central Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 and Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017.
  • The orders have imposed a demand of tax along with interest and penalty.
  • DCBL has good grounds to contest and will file an appeal before the Appellate Authorities within prescribed timelines.
  • The financial impact on DCBL is limited to the aforesaid tax, interest and penalty.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dalmia Bharat Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [EXHICON] Exhicon Events Media Solutions Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Connected Persons
item.description:
Exhicon Events Media Solutions Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all Connected/ Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. This closure is in accordance with the 'Code of Fair Disclosure and Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading' of the company and the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, and will remain in force until 48 hours after the declaration of the Financial Results for the half year and year ending on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration and declaration of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Exhicon Events Media Solutions Ltd announces trading window closure for Connected/ Designated Persons
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026, and will remain until 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the year ending on March 31, 2026
  • In accordance with the 'Code of Fair Disclosure and Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading' and SEBI regulations
  • Date of Board Meeting for consideration and declaration of results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Exhicon Events Media Solutions Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SHINEFASH] Shine Fashions (India) Ltd Clarifies Inadvertent Disclosure of Share Disposal by Promoter
item.description:
Shine Fashions (India) Ltd has clarified that a disclosure appearing under the BSE Listing Centre regarding a transaction of disposal of shares by Mr. Anish Anil Mehta was inadvertently made. The disclosure, which appeared under the BSE Listing Centre and reflected a transaction of disposal of shares by Mr. Anish Anil Mehta, was submitted pursuant to an email received from BSE seeking rectification of a discrepancy in an earlier disclosure filed on January 3, 2026. The Company inadvertently uploaded the corrected XBRL file without selecting the 'revised' option. Upon noticing the error, the Company uploaded the revised XBRL file correctly. The Company clarifies that no transaction involving disposal of shares has taken place on March 26, 2026. The disclosure pertains only to the revision of the earlier filing dated January 3, 2026, relating to a transaction that occurred on January 2, 2026. Shareholders and stakeholders are requested not to be confused or misled by the initial filing, as the same was an inadvertent error and has since been duly rectified.

  • Shine Fashions (India) Ltd clarifies inadvertent disclosure of share disposal by promoter.
  • The disclosure was made while rectifying a discrepancy in an earlier disclosure.
  • The Company inadvertently uploaded the corrected XBRL file without selecting the 'revised' option.
  • No transaction involving disposal of shares took place on March 26, 2026.
  • The disclosure pertains to the revision of an earlier filing relating to a transaction that occurred on January 2, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shine Fashions (India) Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [HARIAAPL] Haria Apparels Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 Results
item.description:
Haria Apparels Ltd. has announced that the trading window will be closed from April 1st, 2026, until the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the quarter ended March 31st, 2026. This announcement is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Haria Apparels Ltd. has decided to close the trading window from April 1st, 2026.
  • The closure will last until the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of Q4 results for the year ending March 31st, 2026.
  • This decision is in line with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Haria Apparels Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [AMITINT] Trading Window of Amit International Ltd. to Close for Quarter Ended 31st March, 2026
item.description:
Amit International Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons of the company. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting to consider the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting will be intimated to the stock exchange separately.

  • Amit International Ltd. to close trading window for designated persons.
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026.
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after the Board Meeting for financial results consideration.
  • Board Meeting date to be intimated to stock exchange separately.
  • Announcement made in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMIT INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAXHEALTH] Max Healthcare Institute Ltd Closes Trading Window Before Q4 and FY Ending March 31, 2026
item.description:
Max Healthcare Institute Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons. The date of the board meeting to consider and approve the financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Max Healthcare Institute Ltd closes trading window in accordance with SEBI regulations and company's code of conduct.
  • Trading window to remain closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for Q4 and FY ending March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the board meeting to consider and approve the financial results is yet to be announced.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [HARIAAPL] Haria Apparels Ltd Trading Window Closure Notice for Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Haria Apparels Ltd has announced that the trading window will be closed from April 1st, 2026, until the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the Quarter ended March 31st, 2026. This is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Haria Apparels Ltd to close trading window for Q1 2026 results
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 1st, 2026
  • Window to reopen after the expiry of 48 hours post Q1 2026 financial results declaration

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Haria Apparels Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ROYALCU] Royal Cushion Vinyl Products Ltd. Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Royal Cushion Vinyl Products Ltd. has announced that the trading window will be closed from 01st April, 2026 until the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March, 2026. This closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, Company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders and BSE Circulars. The Designated Persons have been intimated not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period.

  • Trading window of Royal Cushion Vinyl Products Ltd. to be closed from 01st April, 2026
  • Closure due to SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and Company’s Code of Conduct
  • Closure to last until the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March, 2026
  • Designated Persons have been informed not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period
  • The date of the Meeting of Board of Directors to approve the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ROYAL CUSHION VINYL PRODUCTS LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PBFL] Trading Window Closure Notice for P. B. Films Ltd's Half Yearly Results
item.description:
P. B. Films Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The trading window will remain closed from 01.04.2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the half year ended 31.03.2026. This closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and a clarification given by BSE.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure from 01.04.2026 until 48 hours after half yearly results declaration
  • In accordance with SEBI Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations, 2015
  • Clarification provided by BSE
  • Applies to P. B. Films Ltd for half year ended 31.03.2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: P. B. Films Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RELIANCE] Reliance Industries Ltd Denies Baseless Reports of Iranian Crude Oil Purchase
item.description:
Reliance Industries Ltd has categorically rejected recent media reports alleging the purchase of crude oil of Iranian origin. The company states that these claims are entirely baseless, factually incorrect, and misleading. They urge media outlets to verify facts thoroughly before publication and to refrain from disseminating unsubstantiated reports that can misinform stakeholders and the public.

  • Reliance Industries Ltd denies media reports of purchasing Iranian crude oil
  • Company states claims are baseless and factually incorrect
  • Urges media outlets to verify facts before publication
  • Aim to prevent misinformation of stakeholders and the public

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal
